title: configure now needs pthread compiler flag
body:
After #6488 I appear to need to add `CXXFLAGS='-pthread'` to my `configure`.  Is this expected / desirable?  Without that flag I get:
```
checking whether clang++ supports C++14... no                                                             
checking whether clang++ supports C++14 with -std=gnu++17... no                        
configure:                                                                                                                                                                                                          
configure: error: the clang++ compiler appears to not support C++14.    
                                                                                                          
Verilator requires a C++14 or newer compiler.                                                             
```
because:
```
/usr/bin/ld: /usr/tmp/conftest-2bea5d.o: in function `std::thread::_M_thread_deps_never_run()':
conftest.cpp:(.text._ZNSt6thread24_M_thread_deps_never_runEv[_ZNSt6thread24_M_thread_deps_never_runEv]+0x5): undefined reference to `pthread_create'
/usr/bin/ld: conftest.cpp:(.text._ZNSt6thread24_M_thread_deps_never_runEv[_ZNSt6thread24_M_thread_deps_never_runEv]+0xa): undefined reference to `pthread_join'
```
code_blocks:
checking whether clang++ supports C++14... no                                                             
checking whether clang++ supports C++14 with -std=gnu++17... no                        
configure:                                                                                                                                                                                                          
configure: error: the clang++ compiler appears to not support C++14.    
                                                                                                          
Verilator requires a C++14 or newer compiler.                                                             
/usr/bin/ld: /usr/tmp/conftest-2bea5d.o: in function `std::thread::_M_thread_deps_never_run()':
conftest.cpp:(.text._ZNSt6thread24_M_thread_deps_never_runEv[_ZNSt6thread24_M_thread_deps_never_runEv]+0x5): undefined reference to `pthread_create'
/usr/bin/ld: conftest.cpp:(.text._ZNSt6thread24_M_thread_deps_never_runEv[_ZNSt6thread24_M_thread_deps_never_runEv]+0xa): undefined reference to `pthread_join'
